race.comment: JUST RESPONSE (3) lightly raced Justify gelding who resumes with a sound record. Proven at this track and looks set for a good prep after his slick 1000m trial win. Should prove too strong for these. BLUE SUEDE HOOVES (6) ridden positively from the wide draw when sat on the speed to shed his Maiden tag at start eleven over 1100m at Hawkesbury. Tougher assignment this time and place prospects look best. LIGHTNING GLORY (1) resumes after he showed ability in the first prep. Stuck on late with a tidy third over 1350m at Wyong last November. Fitted with the one trial placing over 1000m and can return in good order with the 3kg claim. BONDASONG (2) since kept up to the mark with a trial placing over 1000m at Wyong. No match for Aisle Two at his second race start  when sixth over 1200m at Kembla Grange. Loves the going and can return to form.
